title: VIT University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: VIT University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
